title: Benjamin Rogers
compiled_truth: Benjamin Rogers is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-04), Benjamin Rogers sent 1831 and received 1753 emails, totalling 3584 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Miller](people/don-miller) (254), [Jinsung Myung](people/jinsung-myung) (104), [James Heckler](people/james-heckler-csfb) (68), [Brandon Neff](people/brandon-neff) (56), [Ross Newlin](people/ross-newlin) (50). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, sent, sent_items.
